CustomField.formula:
IF( AND( MONTH(TODAY())>= MONTH(CloseDate), YEAR(TODAY()) >= YEAR(CloseDate), MONTH(TODAY()) <= MONTH(Contract_Length_CAT__c * MONTH(CloseDate) + Contract_Length_CAT__c + CloseDate), YEAR(TODAY()) <= YEAR(Contract_Length_CAT__c * MONTH(CloseDate) + Contract_Length_CAT__c + CloseDate)
), Estimated_Recurring_Monthly_Revenue__c, NULL )
CustomField.label: Current Monthly Revenue
